title: Claude Code hook input (JSON on stdin)
description: Permissive schema for the JSON payload Claude Code writes to a hook's stdin. Hook event names map to slightly different shapes (e.g., PreToolUse carries tool_name + tool_input; UserPromptSubmit carries prompt; SessionStart carries source). This schema accepts any documented top-level field and is intentionally permissive on per-event shape until the docs stabilise.
